'''âh-j-g''' ('''kahajag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unadvise|unadvise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unadvise|unadvise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-j-g
|-
! Lemma
| kahajag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihajag|thihajag]] || [[word:jihajag|jihajag]] || [[word:shihajag|shihajag]] || [[word:kihajag|kihajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhajag|thuthuhajag]] || [[word:jujuhajag|jujuhajag]] || [[word:shushuhajag|shushuhajag]] || [[word:kukuhajag|kukuhajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhajag|thuhajag]] || [[word:juhajag|juhajag]] || [[word:shuhajag|shuhajag]] || [[word:kuhajag|kuhajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhajag|thuhajag]] || [[word:juhajag|juhajag]] || [[word:shuhajag|shuhajag]] || [[word:kuhajag|kuhajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehajag|thehajag]] || [[word:jehajag|jehajag]] || [[word:shehajag|shehajag]] || [[word:kehajag|kehajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohajag|thothohajag]] || [[word:jojohajag|jojohajag]] || [[word:shoshohajag|shoshohajag]] || [[word:kokohajag|kokohajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohajag|thohajag]] || [[word:johajag|johajag]] || [[word:shohajag|shohajag]] || [[word:kohajag|kohajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohajag|thohajag]] || [[word:johajag|johajag]] || [[word:shohajag|shohajag]] || [[word:kohajag|kohajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhajag|thĂŠhajag]] || [[word:jĂŠhajag|jĂŠhajag]] || [[word:shĂŠhajag|shĂŠhajag]] || [[word:kĂŠhajag|kĂŠhajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahajag|thathahajag]] || [[word:jajahajag|jajahajag]] || [[word:shashahajag|shashahajag]] || [[word:kakahajag|kakahajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahajag|thahajag]] || [[word:jahajag|jahajag]] || [[word:shahajag|shahajag]] || [[word:kahajag|kahajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahajag|thahajag]] || [[word:jahajag|jahajag]] || [[word:shahajag|shahajag]] || [[word:kahajag|kahajag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahajag|shahajag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahajag|goshahajag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahajag|gokishahajag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahajagnĂŒ|shahajagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahajagnknĂŒ|goshahajagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahajagnĂŒ|gokishahajagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahajagshĂ«|shahajagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahajagnkshĂ«|goshahajagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahajagshĂ«|gokishahajagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahajagro|shahajagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahajagnkro|goshahajagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahajagro|gokishahajagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahajagmu|shahajagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahajagnkmu|goshahajagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahajagmu|gokishahajagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahajagsher|shahajagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahajagnksher|goshahajagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahajagsher|gokishahajagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahajagng|shahajagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahajagnkng|goshahajagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahajagng|gokishahajagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahajagya|shahajagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahajagnkya|goshahajagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahajagya|gokishahajagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahajagyam|shahajagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahajagnkyam|goshahajagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahajagyam|gokishahajagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahajagnĂŒshĂ«|shahajagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahajagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahajagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahajagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahajagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahajagnĂŒro|shahajagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahajagnknĂŒro|goshahajagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahajagnĂŒro|gokishahajagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahajagnĂŒmu|shahajagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahajagnknĂŒmu|goshahajagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahajagnĂŒmu|gokishahajagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahajagshĂ«nĂŒ|shahajagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahajagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahajagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahajagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahajagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahajagshĂ«ro|shahajagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahajagnkshĂ«ro|goshahajagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahajagshĂ«ro|gokishahajagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahajagshĂ«mu|shahajagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahajagnkshĂ«mu|goshahajagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahajagshĂ«mu|gokishahajagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahajagronĂŒ|shahajagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahajagnkronĂŒ|goshahajagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahajagronĂŒ|gokishahajagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahajagroshĂ«|shahajagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahajagnkroshĂ«|goshahajagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahajagroshĂ«|gokishahajagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahajagromu|shahajagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahajagnkromu|goshahajagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahajagromu|gokishahajagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahajagmunĂŒ|shahajagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahajagnkmunĂŒ|goshahajagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahajagmunĂŒ|gokishahajagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahajagmushĂ«|shahajagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahajagnkmushĂ«|goshahajagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahajagmushĂ«|gokishahajagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahajagmuro|shahajagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahajagnkmuro|goshahajagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahajagmuro|gokishahajagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
